settings.photographer_bio: Based in Brooklyn. Specializes in natural light portrait and editorial work.
settings.photographer_style: Known for their quiet, observational approach and sensitivity to natural light. Work draws on the documentary tradition — candid, unhurried, and deeply attentive to moment.

settings.feature_description: North-facing warehouse windows, soft and even all day.
Rent from our restored collection at standard shop pricing.
Ground floor, wide double doors, parking nearby.

settings.item_description: Fresh 9ft seamless paper pull, color of your choice.
Up to 3 available. Includes Air Remote and sync cord adapter.
On-set assistance: setup, teardown, lighting support.
Tethering, color management, file backup. Bring your own.
Full DT kit included: tether station, cards, color tools.

settings.hero_description: A bookable photo studio in Brooklyn. Natural light, restored film cameras, lighting, and crew available.
settings.suite_body: If you need more than just a space — concept, photographers, stylists, props, post — we can put the whole thing together. Tell us what you're trying to make and we'll build the team and the day around it.

settings.step_description: Every body, back, and lens is examined for mechanical operation, electronic function, light seals, and optical clarity.
Complete clean, lubricate, and adjust. Shutters calibrated, mirrors aligned, focusing screens cleaned.
Each camera is loaded with 120 film and test-shot to verify exposure accuracy, light-tightness, and sharpness.
Every Hasselblad ships with our extended warranty. Any issues? Send it back for repair or replacement.

settings.use_case_text: Portrait photographers who demand medium-format tonality
Editorial and fashion shooters working with natural light
Studio work with flash sync at every shutter speed
Fine art and landscape with unmatched Zeiss sharpness
Collectors wanting a daily-shooter, not a shelf piece

settings.hero_description: A true icon of medium-format photography. Fully mechanical, modular, and paired with legendary Zeiss optics. Every unit professionally CLA'd and backed by our 6-month warranty.
settings.quote_text: The default Hasselblad setup for a reason - fast, sharp, and flexible.
settings.specs_description: The 500C/M's modular V-System lets you swap backs, finders, and lenses mid-roll. Fully mechanical means no batteries, no electronics to fail.
settings.cla_description: A lot of cameras get sold with no service history and no accountability. Every Hasselblad body we sell receives a full CLA in our shop. Lenses and accessories are cleaned and serviced as needed before they ship.
settings.cla_quote: Most Hasselblads on the market haven't been serviced in years. Ours have.
settings.why_description_1: Shooting 6x6 on 120 film produces negatives with four times the surface area of 35mm. The result is extraordinary detail and buttery tonal gradation.
settings.why_description_2: The Zeiss Planar T* coating eliminates flare and delivers contrast that has been the benchmark for portrait and editorial work for over half a century.
settings.cta_description: Come handle a Hasselblad in person at our Grand Street shop. Open every day, 11am-8pm.
